rewrite.text:
PROVE plus_zero_right: ∀n. n + 0 = n
BEGIN
  ASSUME n : ℕ
  GOAL: n + 0 = n

  INDUCTION n
    PROVE BASE_CASE: n = 0
      GOAL: 0 + 0 = 0
      SIMPLIFY LHS:
        0 + 0
        = 0    [BY plus_zero]
      THEREFORE 0 + 0 = 0
      CONCLUDE: Base case holds [QED]

    PROVE INDUCTIVE_CASE: n = S m
      INDUCTIVE_HYPOTHESIS ih: m + 0 = m
      GOAL: S m + 0 = S m
      SIMPLIFY LHS:
        S m + 0
        = S (m + 0)    [BY plus_S]
      SIMPLIFY RHS:
        S (m + 0)
        = S m          [BY ih]
      THEREFORE S m + 0 = S m
      CONCLUDE: Inductive case holds [QED]

  CONCLUDE: By induction, n + 0 = n for all natural numbers n [QED]
END

skeleton.text:
intros n.
induction n.
admit.
admit.
